name: Double.From
signature: Double.From(value as any, optional culture as nullable text) as nullable number
description: Returns a Double `number` value from the given `value`. If the given `value` is `null`, `Double.From` returns `null`. If the given `value` is `number` within the range of Double, `value` is returned, otherwise an error is returned. If `value` is of any other type, it will first be converted to a `number` using [`Number.FromText`](number-fromtext.md). An optional `culture` may also be provided (for example, "en-US").
